description: Advancing infernal fighter who combines burn casting with close-range pressure.

presentation.headline: Aggressive burn vanguard who carries infernal pressure into the frontline.
presentation.fantasy_hook: A lantern standard, ember-crested helm, and scorched mantle make every step feel like the front of an advancing flame.
presentation.identity_summary: The Ember Vanguard bridges heavy infernal casting and close-range aggression. Takedowns push the vanguard forward with a brief burst of movement and attack speed.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant movement and attack speed, stacking up to three times while the advance continues.
tradeoffs: Less precise than dedicated ranged builds
